name: ASUS PRIME H610M-K D4 ARGB-CSM Intel H610 (LGA 1700) micro-ATX motherboard DDR4, PCIe 4.0, M.2 slot, Realtek 1 Gb Ethernet, Two-Way AI Noise Cancelation, Aura Sync

description: Budget-friendly H610 micro-ATX motherboard for 12th gen Intel processors with DDR4, PCIe 4.0, and ARGB RGB support.
